_comment: Canonical CDT agent roster (descriptive). The deterministic router uses routing-rules.json; this file documents roles, ownership, model floors, and waves.

agents.name: ui-ux-engineer
agents.role: UX flows, IA, design tokens, a11y

agents.name: backend-engineer
agents.role: APIs, services, business logic, auth, jobs, data access

agents.name: devops-engineer
agents.role: CI/CD, Docker, infra config, release automation

agents.name: technical-writer
agents.role: README, guides, API docs, CHANGELOG, ADRs

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.role: correctness, scope adherence, edge cases, maintainability

agents.name: security-reviewer
agents.role: security review with veto on risk >= medium
